title: Journal Mod
description: journal, ournal, always Keep everything you write.
body:
## Why you need this mod
if you want write some something in you game, this mod this keep your memory with you game.

## Mod features:
- an unrestricted editing journal gui, which is the same as the book and quill editing function.   
- write the log content to the book and quill in hand.   
- Use J can simplely open it.

## Requirement
this mod design for both side.
